svg.text: Bounded hard: Lyapunov contraction ratio across rho
Each panel plots V_next_first / V_k against the run-specific rho line. Red markers indicate first-step contraction violations.
rho=0.95 | solver=90.25% | hard=90.20% | bounded-LS=2000 | y-max=1.02 | clipped=0
rho=0.98 | solver=97.95% | hard=97.95% | bounded-LS=1152 | y-max=1.04 | clipped=19
rho=0.985 | solver=96.50% | hard=96.50% | bounded-LS=1263 | y-max=1.02 | clipped=24
rho=0.99 | solver=99.85% | hard=99.85% | bounded-LS=221 | y-max=1.04 | clipped=21
